EV_base_eq_V1.2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DADAF1
Recv ID: 18DAF1DA
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: DA
Func Name: (H) EVC-HCM-VCM_29b

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "1",
    "supplier": "COP C1A HS",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  }
]
